channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in CSS (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in CSS nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 spiritov/ds.css (557 ⭐)

item.title: 📝 CodeDrobe/skills (230 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: CodeDrobe

item.description:
👤 Owner: gauravrocks009

📝 Repository: gauravrocks009/safari-firefox

📄 Descrizione: A highly refined, premium CSS theme that brings the sleek, flawless macOS Safari aesthetic to Firefox and Firefox based browsers. Built on top of the WhiteSur theme, this project fixes common visual glitches, perfects the UI elements, and introduces true Safari-like "Compact Mode" to firefox

item.description:
👤 Owner: mourning-grove

📝 Repository: mourning-grove/Mournes-Jade-Amber-Theme-CSS

item.title: 📝 whiteg2030-alt/Baiwuchang-PPT-HTML (18 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: whiteg2030-alt

📝 Repository: whiteg2030-alt/Baiwuchang-PPT-HTML

📄 Descrizione: 4个风格极简美学PPT，01极简风格 02暖橙渐变风格 03蓝色渐变风格 04彩色渐变 。非常适合设计师，选择的字体是开源思源黑体，粗细对比，适合专业设计师、数码产品、发布会、年总总结等。 不仅是一个html文件，还会导出一个ppt 是可以编辑的。方便后期修改。

⭐ Stelle: 18

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: CSS

📜 Licenza: No license
